item.action: Define and deploy a creative site with a visual and behavioral identity unrelated to Mirror Cartographer.

progress.creative_premise: The primary weather instrument reveals a hidden echo chamber only after the visitor writes three pressure notes.
progress.verification: updated source was fetched back from the default branch at blob 9fb5b253ff25445aaa39e422e88649055c66c293; static test committed but not runtime-executed
accessibility: hidden route excluded from keyboard order
progress.independence: The experience remains a self-contained playable weather-and-echo fiction with no project explanation, research dashboard, medical claims, or conversion logic.

remaining: execute the static contracts in an observable runtime
establish a public hosting URL bound to an immutable commit
capture mobile interaction and layout proof
verify the three-note reveal and reversible erase behavior in a browser
